chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1221 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 25-05-2022 Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through this Petition, the Petitioner has sought release of pension and gratuity. Notice was ordered and comments have been filed by concerned Respondents, wherein it is stated that insofar as the pension is concerned, the same is being paid to the Petitioner through Administrator, Union Council Manghanwari, District Khairpur. Insofar as the gratuity is concerned, pursuant to notification dated 12-11-2020, the Union Council is no more authorized to release gratuity, and for that, case has to be processed by the concerned District Council. It further appears that the Administrator, District Council, Khairpur has filed a statement, wherein it is stated that the Petitioner has not approached his office with relevant documents pursuant to the above notification, so that his case could be processed. In view of such position, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Petitioner to approach the concerned District Council for release of gratuity along with requisite documents. Once the documents to the satisfaction of the District Council are furnished, the case of the Petitioner be decided preferably within a maximum period of sixty days from today. Copy of this order be issued to the AAG’s office for compliance. With these observations, the Petition stands disposed of.
Copy of this order be issued to the AAG’s office for compliance. With these observations, the Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
